claim: Devin Desktop uses adaptive model routing to automatically select the best-performing model for each task, with fast efficient models for simple tasks and more complex ones for complex work
actionable: Enable adaptive routing in Devin Desktop's model picker to optimize token usage and performance across heterogeneous workloads
source_title: Devin Desktop Full Tour: One Place to Manage Every Coding Agent

claim: Devin Local can spawn subagents as independent workers handling subtasks in foreground or background while the main agent continues
actionable: Design agent workflows with subagent spawning to parallelize subtask execution and maintain parent agent progress
source_title: Devin Desktop Full Tour: One Place to Manage Every Coding Agent

claim: Devin Desktop enables fine-grained permissions scoped to file reads, writes, commands, and network access with optional OS-level sandboxing
actionable: Configure allow/ask/deny rules at file and command level in Devin Desktop to enforce principle of least privilege in agent workflows
source_title: Devin Desktop Full Tour: One Place to Manage Every Coding Agent

claim: Deep wiki provides symbol-level code understanding via hover tooltips showing real explanations of what functions do, how they're used, and how they fit into the codebase
actionable: Use Deep Wiki in Devin Desktop to quickly understand code context when reviewing agent work or onboarding to new systems
source_title: Devin Desktop Full Tour: One Place to Manage Every Coding Agent

claim: Code maps allow agents to explore repositories and build hierarchical maps showing execution order and component relationships for system-level understanding
actionable: Have agents generate code maps to document system architecture and share with teams for onboarding or design discussions
source_title: Devin Desktop Full Tour: One Place to Manage Every Coding Agent

claim: Spaces in Devin Desktop group work related to one task with agents, PRs, files and shared context so new sessions inherit context and don't require re-explanation
actionable: Organize coding work into Spaces to maintain context across multiple agent sessions working on related features
source_title: Devin Desktop Full Tour: One Place to Manage Every Coding Agent
